name: Meridian
legalNameNote: Marketing name for the PSI TradeMonitor NinjaTrader 8 add-on. In-product labels may differ.
tagline: The first real-time psychological stability index — built for active traders
description: Meridian is the first real-time psychological stability index for active traders. It tracks seven behavioral dimensions during your live NinjaTrader 8 session and distills them into a live PSI score — entirely on your PC, no cloud.

systemRequirements.ninjaTrader: NinjaTrader 8 — we recommend the latest stable build from NinjaTrader
systemRequirements.note: Older NinjaTrader 8 builds may work but are not guaranteed. NinjaTrader 7 is not supported.
